rationale: All brief elements are present and correct: a #7C5CFF ring with a contrasting white diamond and orbital dot, a wide bold white NOVA with generous tracking, and a muted gray 'light the way' tagline. The filmstrip shows the right choreography — black at start, ring arc assembling by tile 2, mark complete before the wordmark/tagline fade in around tiles 3-4, a long hold, then a dim-to-black fade in the final tiles. Composition is cleanly centered and optically balanced with nothing clipped, and the soft glow plus consistent letterspacing read as polished. Motion drops a point because the hold tiles look essentially static (the called-for subtle float is not discernible) and the end fade reaches full black with little visible scale-up.
